benchmark_analysis.text_layout: large bold text center or bottom — 1~2 lines, high contrast (white/yellow on dark)
benchmark_analysis.color_tone: dark background with neon/glowing objects (science visuals) or dramatic illustrated scenes
benchmark_analysis.art_style: photorealistic 3D render (science objects) OR anime illustration — both work well
benchmark_analysis.face_style: minimize faces — focus on objects, phenomena, space, explosions, scientific visuals
benchmark_analysis.notes: Science thumbnails should emphasize the phenomenon/object, not people. Dark cinematic or neon glow style. Bold high-contrast text. Jisik-style anime also very effective.
